title: nama undulata var. undulata
intro: Nama undulata var. undulata, also known as the 'Wavy Nama', is a type of plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which is rich in sesquiterpenes and has anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nama undulata var. undulata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and protect against infections, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Nama undulata var. undulata can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and essential oil extracts, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate various health conditions.
